name: Unison Four
explanation: A four-VCO unison mono/poly synthesizer. Every note stacks four band-limited saw/pulse oscillators that fan apart as Detune rises, piling into one fat, beating unison lead or bass — or spreading across a chord when several notes are held. Oscillator 1 hard-syncs the others (Sync) for resonant-formant grit, and the stack runs through a resonant 4-pole low-pass with its own decay envelope. Controls: Detune, Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Sync, Decay and Level.
